category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Pakistan) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Pakistan Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入巴基斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入巴基斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Pakistan requirements: PSQCA conformity and marking where in scope, PS/IEC 62133 cell safety, PTA type approval for wireless functions, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer obligation. Pakistan has no EU-style horizontal battery regulation, RoHS, or EPR regime.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与巴基斯坦要求对照：适用范围内的PSQCA合格评定与标识、PS/IEC 62133电芯安全、含无线功能产品的PTA型号核准、UN 38.3运输，以及在地进口商义务。巴基斯坦没有欧盟式的横向电池法规、RoHS或EPR制度。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與巴基斯坦要求對照：適用範圍內的PSQCA合格評定與標識、PS/IEC 62133電芯安全、含無線功能產品的PTA型號核准、UN 38.3運輸，以及在地進口商義務。巴基斯坦沒有歐盟式的橫向電池法規、RoHS或EPR制度。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters selling into Pakistan must meet PSQCA conformity and marking where the product falls under PSQCA's mandatory list, demonstrate cell safety against PS/IEC 62133, obtain PTA type approval if the product has wireless functions, hold a valid UN 38.3 transport test report, and ship through a registered in-country importer — none of which is satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification. Pakistan does not have an EU-style horizontal battery regulation, RoHS, or EPR scheme.
answer_first.zh: 向巴基斯坦销售的中国锂电池及移动电源出口商，须在产品列入PSQCA强制目录时满足PSQCA合格评定与标识、依据PS/IEC 62133证明电芯安全、若产品含无线功能须取得PTA型号核准、持有有效的UN 38.3运输测试报告，并通过已注册的在地进口商出货——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。巴基斯坦没有欧盟式的横向电池法规、RoHS或EPR制度。
answer_first.zht: 向巴基斯坦銷售的中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商，須在產品列入PSQCA強制目錄時滿足PSQCA合格評定與標識、依據PS/IEC 62133證明電芯安全、若產品含無線功能須取得PTA型號核准、持有有效的UN 38.3運輸測試報告，並通過已註冊的在地進口商出貨——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。巴基斯坦沒有歐盟式的橫向電池法規、RoHS或EPR制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator or standards-body sources (psqca.com.pk, pta.gov.pk, neeca.gov.pk, iec.ch, unece.org) preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
